targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pipeline_id) as total FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo()
SELECT AVG(job_run_seconds) as avg_duration FROM circleci_usage WHERE job_run_seconds IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo()

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN job_build_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as success_pct FROM circleci_usage WHERE job_build_status IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo()
SELECT SUM(total_credits) as total FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo()
SELECT SUM(total_credits) * $cost_per_credit as total FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo()

WITH ordered AS (SELECT project_name, workflow_name, job_name, job_build_status, job_run_started_at, job_run_stopped_at, LAG(job_build_status) OVER (PARTITION BY project_name, workflow_name, job_name ORDER BY job_run_started_at) as prev_status, LAG(job_run_stopped_at) OVER (PARTITION BY project_name, workflow_name, job_name ORDER BY job_run_started_at) as prev_stopped FROM circleci_usage WHERE job_build_status IN ('success','failed') AND job_run_started_at IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo()) SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (job_run_started_at - prev_stopped))/60)::numeric, 1) as mttr_minutes FROM ordered WHERE job_build_status = 'success' AND prev_status = 'failed'

panels.title: MTTR
panels.description: Mean Time To Recovery: avg minutes from a failed job to the next successful run of the same job

targets.rawSql: SELECT pipeline_created_at::date as time, COUNT(DISTINCT pipeline_id) as pipelines FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pipeline_created_at::date ORDER BY time

SELECT pipeline_created_at::date as time, COUNT(DISTINCT pipeline_id) as pipelines, SUM(total_credits) * $cost_per_credit as daily_cost FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pipeline_created_at::date ORDER BY time

SELECT project_name || ' - ' || workflow_name as workflow_label, workflow_name, project_name, COUNT(DISTINCT workflow_id) as workflow_count, COUNT(*) as total_job_runs, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY job_run_seconds) as median_duration, AVG(job_run_seconds) as avg_duration, MAX(job_run_seconds) as longest_job_duration FROM circleci_usage WHERE job_run_seconds IS NOT NULL AND workflow_name IS NOT NULL AND project_name IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY project_name, workflow_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY median_duration DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT project_name || ' - ' || job_name as job_label, job_name, project_name, resource_class, executor, COUNT(*) as total_job_runs, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY job_run_seconds) as median_duration, AVG(job_run_seconds) as avg_duration, MAX(job_run_seconds) as longest_duration FROM circleci_usage WHERE job_run_seconds IS NOT NULL AND job_name IS NOT NULL AND project_name IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY project_name, job_name, resource_class, executor HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY median_duration DESC LIMIT 40

SELECT project_name || ' - ' || job_name as job_label, job_name, project_name, resource_class, executor, COUNT(*) as total_job_runs, AVG(median_cpu_utilization_pct) as avg_cpu_utilization, AVG(median_ram_utilization_pct) as avg_ram_utilization, AVG(job_run_seconds) as avg_duration, SUM(total_credits) * $cost_per_credit as total_cost FROM circleci_usage WHERE median_cpu_utilization_pct IS NOT NULL AND median_ram_utilization_pct IS NOT NULL AND job_name IS NOT NULL AND project_name IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY project_name, job_name, resource_class, executor HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 AND (AVG(median_cpu_utilization_pct) < 40 OR AVG(median_ram_utilization_pct) < 40) ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT pipeline_created_at::date as time, SUM(compute_credits) * $cost_per_credit as "Compute", SUM(dlc_credits) * $cost_per_credit as "DLC", SUM(storage_credits) * $cost_per_credit as "Storage", SUM(network_credits) * $cost_per_credit as "Network", SUM(lease_credits) * $cost_per_credit as "Lease" FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pipeline_created_at::date ORDER BY time
SELECT SUM(total_credits) * $cost_per_credit as total_cost FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo()

SELECT project_name, job_name, resource_class, executor, SUM(total_credits) as total_credits, AVG(total_credits) as avg_credits_per_run, COUNT(*) as job_count, SUM(total_credits) * $cost_per_credit as cost FROM circleci_usage WHERE total_credits IS NOT NULL AND job_name IS NOT NULL AND project_name IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY project_name, job_name, resource_class, executor ORDER BY total_credits DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT project_name, job_name, resource_class, COUNT(*) as runs, SUM(total_credits) * $cost_per_credit as cost, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(total_credits) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(total_credits) FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo()), 0), 2) as pct_of_total FROM circleci_usage WHERE (job_name ILIKE '%scan%' OR job_name ILIKE '%security%' OR job_name ILIKE '%sast%' OR job_name ILIKE '%snyk%' OR job_name ILIKE '%checkstyle%' OR job_name ILIKE '%dependency%' OR job_name ILIKE '%audit%') AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY project_name, job_name, resource_class ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT pipeline_created_at::date as time, AVG(job_run_seconds) as avg_duration FROM circleci_usage WHERE project_name = 'smarter-testing-go-and-jest' AND job_run_seconds IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pipeline_created_at::date ORDER BY time

panels.title: TIA Impact — Job Duration Over Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT pipeline_created_at::date as time, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN job_build_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as success_pct FROM circleci_usage WHERE project_name = 'flaky-todo-list' AND job_build_status IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pipeline_created_at::date ORDER BY time

panels.title: Flaky Test Fix — Success Rate Over Time

targets.rawSql: WITH daily AS (SELECT pipeline_created_at::date as d, SUM(total_credits) as credits FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1) SELECT ROUND(AVG(credits)) as avg_daily_credits FROM daily

WITH daily AS (SELECT pipeline_created_at::date as d, SUM(total_credits) as credits FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at IS NOT NULL AND pipeline_created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND pipeline_created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1) SELECT ROUND(AVG(credits) * 30 * $cost_per_credit, 2) as projected_monthly_cost FROM daily

WITH daily AS (SELECT pipeline_created_at::date as d, SUM(total_credits) as credits FROM circleci_usage WHERE pipeline_created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) SELECT d as time, credits as daily_credits, AVG(credits) OVER (ORDER BY d ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as "7d_avg", SUM(credits) OVER (ORDER BY d) as cumulative FROM daily ORDER BY d
SELECT created_at::date as time, action, COUNT(*) as events FROM circleci_audit_logs WHERE created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND created_at <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at, actor_name, action, target_name FROM circleci_audit_logs WHERE action IN ('project.settings.update', 'project.env_var.create', 'project.env_var.delete') AND created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND created_at <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT created_at, actor_name, action, target_name FROM circleci_audit_logs WHERE action IN ('workflow.job.approved', 'context.secrets.accessed', 'org_member.remove') AND created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND created_at <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT project_name
FROM circleci_usage
WHERE project_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY project_name
list.label: Project
list.name: project_name
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT project_name
FROM circleci_usage
WHERE project_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY project_name
